supported_kernels.name: affine_clamp
supported_kernels.description: Affine pointwise transform with lower and upper saturation
supported_kernels.application: Feature preprocessing, clipping, and bounded signal transforms in inference and control pipelines

supported_kernels.name: affine_score_reduce
supported_kernels.description: Affine transform, thresholding, and reduction fused into one score accumulation
supported_kernels.application: Inference-time score aggregation and thresholded feature pooling in ranking and signal scoring systems

supported_kernels.name: affine_score_reduce_reordered
supported_kernels.description: Held-out affine threshold reduction with reordered arithmetic and guard spelling
supported_kernels.application: Generalization check for score aggregation code written with helper bindings and equivalent guard order

supported_kernels.name: book_imbalance
supported_kernels.description: Elementwise order-book imbalance ratio from bid and ask volumes
supported_kernels.application: Order-book imbalance features for market making and short-horizon prediction

supported_kernels.name: clipped_huber_sum
supported_kernels.description: Huber-style robust loss with per-element clipping
supported_kernels.application: Robust loss accumulation with contribution clipping in training, calibration, and outlier-sensitive estimation

supported_kernels.name: clipped_huber_sum_reordered
supported_kernels.description: Held-out clipped Huber reduction with equivalent arithmetic and reversed comparisons
supported_kernels.application: Generalization check for robust loss reductions expressed through local helper functions

supported_kernels.name: dot
supported_kernels.description: Binary elementwise multiply followed by reduction
supported_kernels.application: Dot products in attention, similarity search, and BLAS-style primitives

supported_kernels.name: dot_pipeline
supported_kernels.description: Local helper decomposition of map2 plus reduce_sum normalized into a dot product
supported_kernels.application: Pipeline-style frontend code that factors tensor algebra into small reusable helpers

supported_kernels.name: huber_sum
supported_kernels.description: Robust Huber-style loss accumulation with nested scalar control flow
supported_kernels.application: Robust regression and noise-tolerant residual scoring

supported_kernels.name: inventory_penalty_sum
supported_kernels.description: Quadratic deviation penalty from a target inventory level
supported_kernels.application: Inventory risk aggregation in market making and execution control

supported_kernels.name: l2_norm_sq
supported_kernels.description: Elementwise square followed by reduction
supported_kernels.application: Norm accumulation for loss terms, diagnostics, and similarity scoring

supported_kernels.name: mse_sum
supported_kernels.description: Squared error accumulation over two vectors
supported_kernels.application: Mean-squared-error style loss accumulation in model training and calibration

supported_kernels.name: mixed_biased_l2_norm
supported_kernels.description: Squared norm after affine input normalization
supported_kernels.application: Regularization and diagnostics over normalized feature vectors

supported_kernels.name: mixed_book_signal
supported_kernels.description: Thresholded and scaled order-book imbalance signal
supported_kernels.application: Order-book feature extraction with guard conditions and scaling in short-horizon trading models

supported_kernels.name: mixed_book_signal_reassociated
supported_kernels.description: Held-out mixed order-book signal with reassociated denominator and guard spelling
supported_kernels.application: Generalization check for branchy order-book feature extraction expressed with helper bindings

supported_kernels.name: mixed_weighted_affine_dot
supported_kernels.description: Weighted dot product with an affine transform on one input
supported_kernels.application: Feature-weighted scoring with local normalization in ranking and scientific models

supported_kernels.name: piecewise_weighted_dot
supported_kernels.description: Branchy weighted dot product with separate positive and negative-path coefficients
supported_kernels.application: Piecewise feature scoring and sign-sensitive similarity aggregation in scientific and quantitative pipelines

supported_kernels.name: piecewise_weighted_dot_reordered
supported_kernels.description: Held-out piecewise weighted dot product with reordered multiply and guard spelling
supported_kernels.application: Generalization check for sign-sensitive reductions written with local weight selection

supported_kernels.name: quote_filter
supported_kernels.description: Spread-based quote filtering with scalar threshold control
supported_kernels.application: Fast quote sanitation and spread-triggered routing logic

supported_kernels.name: ratio_weighted_sum
supported_kernels.description: Weighted ratio accumulation with a fused map plus sum reduction
supported_kernels.application: Scientific and quantitative scoring pipelines that normalize one signal by another before aggregation

supported_kernels.name: ratio_weighted_sum_reassociated
supported_kernels.description: Held-out ratio reduction with reassociated denominator and helper binding
supported_kernels.application: Generalization check for ratio-heavy reductions expressed through equivalent scalar structure

supported_kernels.name: relu
supported_kernels.description: Elementwise threshold using scalar control flow
supported_kernels.application: Activation functions and thresholding in neural network inference

supported_kernels.name: relu_tupled
supported_kernels.description: Tuple destructuring plus local helper function normalized into Tensor1.map
supported_kernels.application: Configuration-driven pointwise transforms with local scalar setup values

supported_kernels.name: relu_guard_reordered
supported_kernels.description: Held-out ReLU with reversed comparison spelling and helper binding
supported_kernels.application: Generalization check for simple activation lowering outside the exact benchmark spelling

supported_kernels.name: saxpy
supported_kernels.description: Affine vector combination through Tensor1.map2
supported_kernels.application: AXPY-style vector updates in linear algebra and optimizer steps

supported_kernels.name: saxpy_curried
supported_kernels.description: Curried helper plus partial application normalized into Tensor1.map2
supported_kernels.application: Higher-level numerical DSLs that express vector updates with local helper combinators

supported_kernels.name: scaled_book_signal
supported_kernels.description: Scaled microstructure imbalance signal from bid and ask vectors
supported_kernels.application: Order-book feature extraction and normalized imbalance signals in low-latency trading systems

supported_kernels.name: signal_clip_reduce

supported_kernels.description: Held-out clipped order-book signal reduction with reassociated arithmetic and explicit negative clip
supported_kernels.application: Generalization check for clipped market-feature reductions written with helper bindings
